campaign_content_records.title: Aid in response to disasters and crises in Switzerland
campaign_content_records.preview: We need you Your donation, our action.
campaign_content_records.body_excerpt: We need you Your donation, our action. Get involved Discover all the ways you can get involved with us: donations, partnerships, school programmes or volunteering. Whether it's a one-off donation, a legacy gift, a corporate collection or a solidarity campaign, explore the many ways you can support Swiss Solidarity and its work. Together, we can go further: find out more about our collaborations with companies and how we can build a partnership with you. Working with Swiss Solidarity, you can benefit from our partnerships and expertise to maximise the impact of your foundation. Make your solidarity last beyond your lifetime by including Swiss Solidarity in your will. Find all the practical information here.
